gigapan.description: Molly and Jay keep asking for Garden pictures, and they deserve garden pictures, but then I am in a rush, or it is raining, or I have a bowl of cereal to eat.  Or I am obsessed with the microscope.  There is always something.  But the cereal rates pretty high on the list.
